mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_review (user_id, product_id, order_id, rating, content, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{rating}, #{content}, datetime('now','localtime'))
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.product_id AS productId, r.order_id AS orderId, r.rating, r.content, r.create_time AS createTime, u.username, p.name AS productName FROM product_review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, order_id AS orderId, rating, content, create_time AS createTime FROM product_review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_id = #{orderId} AND product_id = #{productId}
